description_long: This is a two-story stone house with a gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles and a prominent brick chimney. The facade features symmetrical window placement with dark wooden shutters and a single main entry door. Attached to the left side is a one-car garage with a matching shingled roof and a double-door entrance. The stone exterior gives the house a rustic, traditional appearance, while the windows and doors are framed with contrasting dark wood. The house appears solidly built, with no visible porch or overhang above the main entry. The overall design is simple yet classic, suitable for a suburban or rural neighborhood.
description: A two-story stone house with a gable shingle roof, symmetrical windows with dark shutters, and an attached one-car garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two windows with shutters, and the attached garage with a double door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, brick chimney, and two vertically aligned windows with shutters.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying four windows with shutters and the side of the garage, with no visible doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable end, two windows on the main house, and one window on the garage extension.
attribute_entryway_design: Single main door with no porch or overhang, framed by stone and flanked by shuttered windows.
